creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193272
py-django-annoying-assign-to-django111.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch from svn that assigns www/py-django-annoying from Django 1.8 to Django 1.11.

Changes to the port:
- changed MASTER_SITES to CHEESESHOP
- changed RUN_DEPENDS to Django v1.11


QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
